name: mobile-scaffold
description: Agentic mobile app scaffolding on incubation architecture standards — pick a profile (target mobile-only/+web × size small/large), approve an ADR, scaffold separate git repos (Expo mobile + backend: Hono+Workers+D1 small / NestJS+Postgres/AWS large, plus a react-native-web app when +web) via official scaffolders (stubs only, zero feature code — feature work happens inside generated repos), verify each. Expo + Cloudflare highest priority; Firebase for notifications. Strict structure contract enforced per repo.
